meaning: n.花,旺盛,青春v.(使)开花,(使)繁盛
examples: The daffodils were in full bloom.
Most roses will begin to bloom from late May.
There are a lot of roses in bloom.
Volunteers have cleared scrubland around Shepreth station so the poppies will bloom at next year's anniversary.
" to put them together, " says Francisco Balderrama, one of four fathers who founded Bloom.
